identity.mission: Create a 'Swiss-Analytical' aesthetic that feels like a physical blueprint: precise, objective, and calm.
principles: Fusion: Swiss Poster Design x Architectural Blueprints.
Emotion: Calm Authority. The user should feel clarity, not hype.
Content: Data is the hero. Typography is the interface.
Contrast: High contrast text (Black on White), subtle structural borders.
Negative Space: Massive margins. Let the data breathe.

usage.brand_accent: Use sparingly. Only for primary actions (Submit) or active states. NEVER for backgrounds.
usage.backgrounds: Pure White (#FFFFFF) for main surfaces. Slate-50 (#F8FAFC) for secondary sections.

spacing.scale: Generous. Use p-8, p-12, p-16 for containers. Gap-6 or Gap-8 for grids.
spacing.radius: rounded-none (0px) or rounded-sm (2px). NO large rounded corners.

shadows.strategy: Flat design. Use borders for separation. No drop shadows unless absolutely necessary for overlays (then use shadow-sm).

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 h-10 px-8 rounded-none font-medium uppercase tracking-wide text-sm transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-input hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground h-10 px-8 rounded-none font-medium uppercase tracking-wide text-sm transition-all

cards.style: bg-card text-card-foreground border border-border rounded-none shadow-none p-6 or p-8

inputs.style: rounded-none border-input bg-transparent focus:ring-0 focus:border-primary h-12 text-base

navigation.style: border-b border-border bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md sticky top-0 z-50

landing.hero: Split layout or Centered Typography. Massive H1. Minimal imagery.
landing.features: Grid of cards with visible borders (The 'Grid Borders' Surface Strategy).

images.description: Abstract concrete geometry for Hero section background (use with overlay)

assets.icons: Use 'lucide-react' with stroke-width={1.5} for a thin, technical look.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. UPDATE TAILWIND CONFIG: Add the 'IBM Plex Sans' and 'Inter' fonts. Update the color palette to match the 'design_system.colors' section exactly.
2. GLOBAL CSS: Import the fonts in index.css. Set base styles to 'antialiased'.
3. SHADCN OVERRIDES: Go into /components/ui and REMOVE 'rounded-md' from all components. Replace with 'rounded-none' or 'rounded-sm'. Remove shadows from Cards.
4. LAYOUT: Build the Dashboard using the 'Bento Grid' strategy (gap-px bg-border) to create a grid-line effect.
5. TONE: Ensure all copy is directive and analytical. No exclamation marks.
6. DATA-TESTID: Add data-testid to all interactive elements.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Avoid 'AI Slop': No generic gradients, no centered text blocks without structure.
